resources.label: Pitch Prompt - Without Skill
resources.instruction: Open your Project from Level 2. Start a new chat. Copy and paste this prompt:
resources.content: Create a pitch deck for Operation: Steal the Sun using our mission plan and findings.

resources.label: Pitch Deck Skill File
resources.description: This Skill trains your Minion to build structured, data-backed pitch decks. It works in any Project - not just this one.

resources.label: Pitch Prompt - With Skill
resources.instruction: Go back to your Project. Start a new chat. Copy and paste the exact same prompt:
resources.content: Create a pitch deck for Operation: Steal the Sun using our mission plan and findings.
resources.note: Same words. Watch what your Minion does differently this time.
